hero.headline: Crafting Digital Experiences.
hero.name: Andi Asyraful Amal Ilham
hero.subrole: — a Frontend Developer & Software Engineering Student
hero.tagline: Building modern, fast, and meaningful digital experiences. From elegant UI to smooth interactions — I build products that matter.

about.label: About Me
about.headline: Building with purpose,
about.p1: I am a Software Engineering student at SMK Telkom Makassar with a strong interest in modern web development, software engineering, and digital technology.
about.p2: I actively learn React.js, Next.js, and various frontend technologies to build fast, responsive applications with great user experiences.
about.p3: Beyond web development, I am also interested in cyber security, network administration, and interface design. My goal is to become a professional software engineer capable of creating digital products that make a real impact.
about.quote: "Building modern, fast, and meaningful digital experiences for many people."

skills.label: Expertise
skills.headline: My
skills.description: Technologies and tools I use to build modern, responsive, and high-quality web applications.

experience.label: Journey
experience.headline: Experience &
experience.growing_desc: A timeline of my professional training, hands-on internships, and academic achievements in software engineering.

timeline.description: Worked on modern web development projects using React and Next.js. Contributed to responsive user interfaces, reusable component development, and collaborative development workflows in a professional environment.
Won the Web Programming and Graphic Design competition organized by HMP-TI. Demonstrated problem-solving, frontend development, design thinking, and creativity under competitive conditions.
Completed intensive frontend engineering training specializing in React.js. Gained practical hands-on experience in component design, state management, and modern development standards.
Studying software engineering core concepts, algorithm designs, web development, and networking principles, consistently scoring top grades in technical subjects.

contact.label: Contact
contact.headline: Let's build something
contact.subtitle: Have a project or want to collaborate? I'm always open to interesting discussions and new opportunities. Don't hesitate to reach out!
contact.form_subtitle: I usually reply within one business day.
